content.en:
Chapter 3161 The Super Dimension Storm is Over

The super-dimensional technique created by Ye Tian is based on super-dimensional power. Only when you comprehend the true super-dimensional power can you use it.

And this super-dimensional technique can control super-dimensional Dao soldiers, but it also requires a certain price.

The price Ye Tian paid was to consume one-third of the eternal Dao seed origin of his body and suffered serious injuries, so that he could activate this super-dimensional Dao soldier fragment to burst out a fatal blow.

This super-dimensional technique was named Super-dimensional Controlling Soldier Technique by Ye Tian.

"Try the power of super-dimensional controlling soldier technique and this super-dimensional Dao soldier fragment!"

Death Void.

Ye Tian came here, and no matter how the super-dimensional storm hit him, it couldn't do anything to him.

He had two copies of his body, one of which held a super-dimensional Dao soldier fragment.

"Let's start!"

He used the super-dimensional controlling soldier technique, and with the blessing of super-dimensional power, he controlled this super-dimensional Dao soldier fragment, and the origin of the eternal Dao seed in his body was being quickly absorbed and consumed by it.

"Kill!"

The fragment of the super-dimensional Taoist soldier crossed everything at a speed beyond his concept and killed the other copy body.

The other copy body also used all its super-dimensional power, and even used some super-dimensional secret treasures for defense, and the super-dimensional skills of defense layer by layer also burst out with all its strength.

However.

Puff!

Many defenses were penetrated by the fragment of the super-dimensional Taoist soldier, and all defenses were like paper, and even many super-dimensional secret treasures were instantly penetrated.

And his copy body was also penetrated, and the flesh collapsed and died instantly.

One hit to kill!

"What a terrible attack, just one hit killed my copy body in seconds, even if I activated more super-dimensional secret treasures, I'm afraid I can't stop it!"

Ye Tian said secretly.

He felt that the power of this attack was probably enough to severely damage the half-step super-dimensional realm, or even kill the weaker half-step super-dimensional realm.

It must be said that the super-dimensional Taoist soldier is worthy of being a weapon that can only be used in the super-dimensional realm, far from being comparable to super-dimensional secret treasures.

Fortunately, this is a fragment. If it is a real super-dimensional Taoist soldier, he probably can't activate it anyway.

Of course, in order to activate this super-dimensional Taoist soldier, his copy body was severely damaged and paid a great price.

But if it is a real life-and-death fight, no matter how great the price is, he has to bear it, not to mention that he can change his copy body again.

"This super-dimensional Taoist soldier fragment is my trump card. I have to keep it well. Maybe it will be useful someday." Ye Tian said secretly.

Ye Tian was in a good mood after getting this super-dimensional Taoist soldier fragment.

He had to thank Taiqiong Mountain, otherwise where would he get such a treasure.

As for guarding Taiqiong Mountain and maintaining the super-dimensional formation, it was almost not a cost for him.

It can be said that this time it was a pure profit.

Of course, for Taiqiong Mountain, even if the treasure is precious, if it is exchanged for the immortality of Taiqiong Mountain, it is also a good deal.

Time passed.

Gradually, another long period of time passed.

Unknowingly, the super-dimensional storm has lasted for a super-dimensional era.

For Ye Tian, ​​a super-dimensional era is also a very long time.

Now, his strength has increased again.

For example, his eternal Tao seed has reached the current limit again, and he is qualified to condense the thirteenth eternal world spirit.

Moreover, under the tempering of super-dimensional power, his body has become extremely terrifying.

"The super-dimensional storm has not ended yet, but it has shown the limit of weakening. It seems that it will not be long before the super-dimensional storm will disappear completely!" Ye Tian said secretly.

During this period, he did not continue to explore the super-dimensional storm.

After all, he has already comprehended the true super-dimensional power, and there is no need to take risks for the super-dimensional elves. If he really offends a super-dimensional elf in the super-dimensional realm, he may directly kill the human race.

In that case, it will be a disaster for the human race.

Therefore, he does not need to continue to take risks.

Next, he only needs to wait for the end of the super-dimensional storm, and then continue to wait for the arrival of the Ice Ghost Organization, destroy the Ice Ghost Organization, and use the formation of the Ice Ghost Organization to leave the 7,362nd territory, so as to contact a wider territory.

Since the super-dimensional storm weakened, the supreme forces have all breathed a sigh of relief.

Especially Taiqiong Mountain, the peak realm gods of Taiqiong Mountain are really no longer panicking.

After all, even if Ye Tian leaves now, they can use this broken super-dimensional formation to survive the last period of the super-dimensional storm.

Of course.

Since Ye Tian has accepted the benefits, he will naturally protect Taiqiong Mountain until the day when the super-dimensional storm ends.

Gradually, about three trillion years of the Zhidao Era have passed.

This day.

The super-dimensional storm finally dissipated completely.

t

Eternal Boundary.

Except for a few territories covered by the super-dimensional formation, other places have turned into nothingness.

One peak realm god and high-level realm god appeared, looking at the miserable state of the Eternal Boundary now, they were immediately full of emotion.

However, the self-recovery ability of the Eternal Boundary is still good. As long as the origin is not too seriously damaged, the Eternal Boundary will gradually recover.

Sure enough.

After a period of time, the land of the Eternal Realm condensed, and treasures were born one after another. However, compared with the past, the treasures now are very ordinary treasures, which are of no use to the Realm God.

Death Void.

Ye Tian came here and saw that the Death Void was now full of nothingness. Many things were destroyed by the super-dimensional storm, and even the Death Void was not dangerous now.

Of course.

The peak world gods did not dare to explore the death void casually. After all, the existing resources were absolutely full of great dangers. After all, even the super-dimensional storm did not destroy those resources. How could it be simple?

If some peak world gods really couldn't resist the temptation, it would be their own business if they died.

At this time, Ye Tian did not explore the death void, but continued to practice in seclusion and began to impact the thirteenth eternal world spirit.

His foundation was already extremely solid, and it should not be difficult to break through.

Soon, he used the power of super-dimensionality to break through.

He was not 100% sure of condensing the thirteenth eternal world spirit, but more than 90% was no problem.

In the eternal Tao seed, the thirteenth eternal world spirit gradually began to condense under the action of super-dimensional power.

The whole process was very easy, and no danger occurred.

In the end, Ye Tian successfully condensed the thirteenth eternal world spirit.

Boom! ! !

As the thirteenth eternal world spirit condensed, his cultivation began to break through, his physical body and eternal Tao seed began to transform, and his strength was also growing.

After a long time, the transformation was complete, and his strength soared again.

".~ Condensing the thirteenth eternal world spirit, my cultivation has far surpassed those peak world gods among the supreme forces. Maybe I am the first peak world god to condense my cultivation to the thirteenth eternal world spirit!"

Ye Tian murmured,
